canonical_definition: Comprehensive cross-modal safety benchmark with 2,241 image-text pairs designed to prevent safety information leakage, used to evaluate true multimodal safety understanding.

relationships.evidence: MM-safetybench, RTVLM, and VLSBench consist of an image and a query where the text query is seemingly benign, but when combined with the respective image, it is harmful
